description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this black and red nike football backpack. Carry it to college, office or on a casual day out with your friends. It will also prove to be handy for your workout sessions and other Sports endeavors, since it has a shoe compartment and lots of space to accomodate all your items. The perfectly sturdy, good looking bag has arrived!MeasurementHeight: 47 cmWidth: 37 cmDepth: 18 cmCapacity: 27 litresMade of 100% polyester for enhanced durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityWater-resistant tarapaulin bottomOne main roomy zippered compartment with a zippered compartment on the front that has a mesh zippered pocket for storing essentialsZippered shoe compartment at the baseSmall zippered pouch on the side for stowing essentialsnike swoosh printed on the frontHaul loops for ease of carryingPadded, adjustable shoulders straps with mesh lining,  to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyMesh panels on the back for improved comfort and ventilation  Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
